## Kill Signal
<!-- Select the PRIMARY reason for rejection. Apply this as a label to this issue. -->

**Filter Kill Signals:**
- [ ] `fail-electronics` — contains any electronic component
- [ ] `fail-injection-mold` — requires injection molding
- [ ] `fail-imported-component` — core component must be imported
- [ ] `fail-no-aha` — no AHA reaction in 3 seconds
- [ ] `fail-needs-explanation` — value requires description
- [ ] `fail-intellectual-aha` — clever but not desired
- [ ] `fail-assembly-complex` — more than 6 precision steps
- [ ] `fail-cogs-high` — cannot reach COGS ceiling at batch 30
- [ ] `fail-margin-broken` — cannot leave shop 40–60% margin

**Market Kill Signals:**
- [ ] `on-jumia` — found on Jumia Egypt
- [ ] `on-noon` — found on Noon Egypt
- [ ] `on-facebook` — found on Facebook Marketplace Egypt
- [ ] `on-instagram` — found on Instagram Egypt
- [ ] `in-shops` — found in physical Egyptian shops

**Cultural Kill Signals:**
- [ ] `fail-no-egyptian-fit` — cannot name specific Egyptian behavior
- [ ] `fail-chinese-context` — appeal depends on Chinese cultural context
- [ ] `fail-cute-only` — aesthetic appeal, no functional core
- [ ] `fail-behavior-change` — requires buyer to adopt a new behavior

**Timing Kill Signals:**
- [ ] `timing-too-early` — 1688 fewer than 3 suppliers
- [ ] `timing-window-closed` — AliExpress English listings with reviews
- [ ] `timing-season-late` — less than 3 weeks to season (season-amplified product)

**Pre-Sell Kill Signals:**
- [ ] `presell-fail` — fewer than 2 shop owners committed
- [ ] `presell-no-reaction` — shop owners didn't respond to video/prototype
